rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate identically (3/10) with the same justification and concerns, citing the same missing job-relevant qualifications (C/UNIX embedded experience, Linux kernel modification, MACsec/802.1X, Japanese proficiency). The only differences are trivial rewordings ('embedded-like environments' vs 'embedded-like systems', 'real-time systems' vs 'real-time apps', 'initiatives' vs '.'). None of the reasoning keys off the location change from various international cities to 'United States' — the score and substance are unchanged.
